title: The Caliphate of al-Muqtadir bi-llah Riot of soldiers during pilgrimage
description: He ism Ja`far b. *Abi al `Abbas* al-Mu`tadid bi-llah *b. Alimad al-Muwaffaq bi-llah*. When the oath of allegiance was given to him, he received the name of al-Muqtadir bi-11,4h. He was then thirteen years, one / / month, and twenty 1-one'l days old. He was [22811 born on Friday night, Ramadan 22, 282 (Friday, November 14, 895). His patronymic is Abu al-Fadl. His mother is a slave girl called Shaghab.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 38
